summary: End-to-end testing of Mundo IA (Spanish AI blog MVP). All 15 backend pytest tests pass (15/15, 100%). Frontend flows verified: home, categories, featured articles, article page (TOC + reading progress + share), search, category, contact, newsletter, 404, cookie banner, ads.txt. Site is fully functional and matches the review spec.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Category cards on Home do not have a data-testid (only the inner 'category-title' exists). Consider adding data-testid="category-card-{slug}" for more robust automation.
Minor: Search page's results wrapper could expose a data-testid="search-results" container. Current tests rely on testIds inside ArticleCard which works, but explicit container helps.

Note: The review request referenced slug 'mundo-ia-2026' which does not exist; actual slug is 'mejores-herramientas-inteligencia-artificial-2026'. Test updated to use real slug. No code change needed.
BackToTop uses strict > 600 threshold. Spec says 'appears after scrolling 600px' which is satisfied (visible for scrollY > 600). Confirmed visible at scrollY=900+.
test_credentials: N/A - no authentication in this app
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 10 articles and 5 categories on startup (already seeded). Tests created: TEST_User contact entries and test_newsletter_mundoia@example.com newsletter subscriber (idempotent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, JUnit XML at /app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml). Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var. All /api routes prefixed. AdSense client id ca-pub-4065544185286337. Ads.txt at /ads.txt root reachable. Article testids are article-card-{slug}, article-card-hero-{slug}, article-card-compact-{slug}. Category cards currently have no per-card testid. BackToTop visible at scrollY > 600.
verified_flows: GET /api/categories -> 5 cats with correct slugs + counts, no _id leak
GET /api/articles/{slug} -> full content, views increment verified
POST /api/newsletter idempotent (same id returned on duplicate)
Home hero 'Herramientas de inteligencia artificial y cómo usarlas en 2026'
3 PUBLICIDAD ad slots on home, 6 on article page
Cookie banner shown on first visit; accept stores 'accepted' in localStorage 'mundo-ia-cookie-consent'
Header search button opens input; Enter navigates to /buscar?q=
Article page: reading-progress-bar present, TOC present, share Twitter/Facebook/Copy testids present
Category page /categoria/herramientas-ia shows filtered articles + sidebar
Search page /buscar?q=prompt shows matching article card
Contact form submits (all fields fillable, submit works)
404 page at unknown route renders page-not-found
